scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only; the full TikTok Business surface (reporting/analytics, creative assets, audiences, pixel events, campaign/ad mutations, etc.) is out of scope until Pass B. tiktok-marketing is read-only in legacy (Capabilities.Write is false, no obviously safe reverse-ETL write surface per the legacy package doc) so no writes.json.

excluded.reason: /report/integrated/get/ is a reporting/analytics/query surface with endpoint-specific parameters; this bundle does not declare a stable collection schema and fixture for it
no allow-listed reverse-ETL writes; tiktok-marketing connector is read-only
